headerTitle: Senior Full-Stack Engineer, AI-Native  ·  Agentic Systems  ·  Claude Code Developer  ·  Production AI Engineering
intro: Cardiff is rebuilding around AI-native agentic systems for financial services workflows. Claude Code and Cursor are my primary development environment across all active projects — MCP protocol, multi-model routing, HITL guardrails in production daily.
bullets: Claude Code and AI-native development as primary workflow — MCP protocol integration, multi-model routing (Haiku/Sonnet/Opus), tool use, HITL confirm-before-execute, Zod-validated output. Not a plugin — the engineering environment across every project.

Agentic systems in production — 14 live AI endpoints across CRM, communications, scheduling, and data extraction. SMS, email, and IVR voice automation pipelines running against live customer data across eight industry verticals.
Python, TypeScript, SQL full-stack — 13 production platforms, 100+ API routes, Docker/PM2/Nginx deployment. Business requirement to prototype to production this week, not next sprint.
matchNotes: Excellent match: AI-native dev workflow (Claude Code/Cursor primary), agentic systems in production, comms agent pipelines (Twilio/Sinch/IMAP), MCP protocol integration. FinTech/lending domain is new but AI workflow automation pattern transfers directly. $101-150K is below pipeline but role quality is high.
